title: The Road to Fort Alamo
writer: Lorenzo Gicca Palli, Francesco Prosperi, Livia Contardi
actors: Ken Clark, Jany Clair, Michel Lemoine
plot: A lone rider comes across a dying soldier, who gives him a paper authorizing the payment of $150,000 to the U.S. Army. The rider gathers some colleagues who disguise themselves as soldiers and who take the paper to a bank.
